meta.governance_note: DRAFT for review. The bot may quote a row ONLY if its signoff_status is 'signed_off'. Rows marked 'pending' are NOT quotable until Legal signs off — the orchestrator must fall back to the official helpline for those.

scheme_payment_status.description: User was expecting government scheme money that has not arrived; wants to know status / why.

clarify_prompt.hinglish: Kaunsi yojana ka paisa — PM-Kisan, pension (APY), ya scholarship?
clarify_prompt.hi: कौन सी योजना का पैसा — PM-Kisan, पेंशन (APY), या scholarship?

pm_kisan_eligibility.description: Whether the user qualifies for PM-Kisan.

clarify_prompt.hinglish: Aap kis state mein kheti karte hain?
clarify_prompt.hi: आप किस राज्य में खेती करते हैं?

fraud_or_unauthorized.description: Money lost, unauthorized debit, OTP/PIN/CVV shared, suspicious link, scam suspected.

out_of_scope.description: Not a supported money topic in this slice.

Karnataka|PM_KISAN.eligibility: Only landholding farmer families with cultivable land in their own name are eligible. Tenant / sharecropper (bataidaar) farmers are excluded.
Karnataka|PM_KISAN.process: Surrender via the 'Voluntary Surrender of PM-Kisan Benefits' module on the national portal, or physically at the local Tahsildar / Nadakacheri office.

PM_KISAN.status_check: Check beneficiary status on the official PM-Kisan portal (pmkisan.gov.in) under 'Know Your Status', using the registration number or Aadhaar.
PM_KISAN.common_delay_reasons: Pending e-KYC, land records not seeded/verified, or an Aadhaar-bank name mismatch are the usual reasons an installment is held.
PM_KISAN.source_ref: PM-Kisan portal / PFMS — PROPOSED, NEEDS LEGAL SIGN-OFF

compliance_constants.const_value: Report within 3 working days to ensure zero liability.
Auto-reversal TAT per RBI: T+1 / 5 days; penalty Rs 100 per day of delay.

fraud_triggers.note: Primary fraud detection is the LLM intent 'fraud_or_unauthorized'. These keywords are a deterministic safety net. The Hinglish list is PROPOSED and needs review — a missed fraud case is the worst failure mode.

not_verified.hinglish: Iska pakka verified jawab abhi mere paas nahi hai. Galat jaankari dene se accha hai main aapko sahi official jagah bhej doon.
not_verified.hi: इसका पक्का verified जवाब अभी मेरे पास नहीं है। गलत जानकारी देने से अच्छा है मैं आपको सही official जगह भेज दूँ।

fraud_stop.hinglish: Ruko — yeh fraud ho sakta hai. Turant 1930 par call karo (cyber-fraud helpline) aur apne bank ko batao. OTP/PIN/CVV kisi ko mat batao — mujhe bhi nahi.
fraud_stop.hi: रुको — यह fraud हो सकता है। तुरंत 1930 पर call करो (cyber-fraud helpline) और अपने bank को बताओ। OTP/PIN/CVV किसी को मत बताओ — मुझे भी नहीं।
